basic_details.job_title: KMF GUMUL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 55 Junior Technician, Assistant Manager and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Kalaburagi-Bidar Hagu Yadagiri Sahakari Haalu Utpadaka Sangha Okkoota Niyamitha, Kalaburagi, under the Karnataka State Cooperative Societies Act, has released an official Employment Notice for various posts including Administrative, Technical, Clerical, and Support Staff positions.

important_dates.interview_date: Will be notified to shortlisted candidates separately

age_limit.details: Age limits as per the Karnataka Cooperative Societies Act and reservation rules. The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age varies by category and post as per government norms: | Ex-Servicemen: Service period is deducted from age; upper age limit applies post-deduction. | Widows: Maximum age relaxation of 10 years applicable. | 371 (J) Kalyana Karnataka candidates: Must have studied in Kalyana Karnataka region schools.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the minimum qualifications specified for each post: | Assistant Manager (P.V.): B.V.Sc. degree from a recognized university with Computer Office Package knowledge. Accountant: M.Com./B.B.M degree from a recognized university, with 1 year B.G.D.M./M.B.A (Materials Management) experience. Computer knowledge required. Minimum 2 years of experience in Public Sector/Dairy/Hotel industry. Technical Officer (Q.T.): B.Tech. (Q.T.) / B.E.S.I. (Q.T.) degree from a recognized university. Minimum 2 years of experience in Dairy/Hotel industry required. Computer knowledge required. Senior Chemist: B.S.C. (Chemistry/Microbiology) degree from a recognized university. Lab experience in large dairy/food industry. Computer knowledge required. Minimum 2 years of experience. Junior Technician (Mechanical/Electrical/Refrigeration & Air Condition/Civil): Diploma in the respective trade (Mechanical/Electrical/Refrigeration & Air Condition/Civil) from a recognized university. Minimum 2 years of experience in public/private sector or dairy industry. Computer knowledge required. Superintendent (Grade-3): Graduation in any discipline from a recognized university. Computer knowledge required. Welfare Assistant (Grade-3): B.Com. degree with second class from a recognized university. Computer and Tally package knowledge required. Accounts Assistant (Grade-3): B.Com. degree from a recognized university. Computer and Tally package knowledge required. Market Assistant (Grade-3): B.B.M./B.B.A. degree (second class) from a recognized university. Computer knowledge required. Junior Technician – Fitter/Electrical/Boiler: ITI in respective trade from a recognized institution. Apprentice Certificate required. Minimum 2 years of experience in Industry/Public/Dairy sector.

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must complete the online application process only:
Visit the official website: https://virtualofficeerp.com/gumul2026 (for regular posts) or https://virtualofficeerp.com/gumulbl2026 (for Backlog posts).
Register and fill the online application form carefully. Ensure all details are correct before final submission.

Upload self-attested scanned copies of: passport-size photo (white background, max 100 KB), signature (max 50 KB), educational/qualification certificates, caste certificate, experience certificate, Kannada medium certificate, Ex-Serviceman certificate (if applicable), Graama certificate, Yojana Niraashritara certificate, and disability certificate (if applicable).
